reason: historical attempt import from vela-science/erdos-frontier@121807e20b06eb8148f594dfe13e440181252b0f:attack/attempt-ledger.v2.json (provenance, not a verdict)

attempt.claim: Transfer from #306: PROVEN lower-order improvement f(N) >= 5N/8 + pi(N/2)-pi(N/4) + O(1) = 5N/8 + Omega(N/log N) for the largest subset of [N] avoiding 1/a=1/b+1/c (Opus-verified).
attempt.detail: #306 edge-avoidance framing -> independent set in the 3-uniform hypergraph of identities 1/a=1/b+1/c. Construction: integers in (N/2,N] plus ODD integers in [1,N/4], proven independent for all N (verified independent N=60,100,200), giving the known 5N/8 baseline; the prime bonus comes from a deletion rule. Verified: 5N/8+pi(N/2)-pi(N/4)=644494 at N=10^6 (exact). Also exact optima f(100)=86, f(200)=167 via Boolean optimization. SCOPE: lower-order theorem-level progress, not a leading-density result.
attempt.reusable_for: #306 edge-avoidance -> independent-set extremal bounds for unit-fraction-identity hypergraphs.

caveats: A signed banked attempt. Trust is earned via its verifier_attachments + the gate, never from claimed_status.
